description: Update only the Go profile with focused race-detector guidance.
prompt: Make a profile-scoped documentation update for Go only. In `templates/profiles/go/README.md`, add guidance that `go test -race ./...` is an optional focused or manual check for race-sensitive concurrent code and should not become the default harness gate unless the target project already treats it as a normal check. Keep the profile conditional and conservative. Do not edit other profiles, generic templates, scripts, tests, docs outside the Go profile, CI, or benchmark task JSON.

commands.name: go profile boundary oracle
command:
import subprocess
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('templates/profiles/go/README.md')
text = path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
required = ['`go test -race ./...`', 'focused', 'manual', 'race-sensitive concurrent code', 'default harness gate']
missing = [item for item in required if item not in text]
assert not missing, 'missing Go profile guidance: ' + ', '.join(missing)
for other in Path('templates/profiles').glob('*/README.md'):
    if other == path:
        continue
    assert '`go test -race ./...`' not in other.read_text(encoding='utf-8'), f'race guidance leaked into {other}'
status = subprocess.check_output(['git', 'status', '--porcelain=v1'], text=True)
changed = {line[3:] for line in status.splitlines() if len(line) >= 4}
assert str(path) in changed, f'{path} must be changed by this task'
